name: 05-12-promoter-growth-critique
title: feedback: promoter growth critique of FableMap
description: Record promoter/growth critique: FableMap has strong engineering process but weak real-user acquisition and first-use validation.
scope: promoter/growth feedback record only; no code changes
creator: lijin
notes: Recorded promoter/growth feedback: project risks over-indexing on docs/tests/internal hardening while lacking real user validation, one-click demo tavern, wow moment, and growth metrics. Recommended immediate actions: 3-user live test, one-click public demo tavern, 10-second demo video, first-use complexity collapse.
